files.notes: File contains 4 distinct lessons as indicated in the table of contents. Three Health and Hygiene lessons (I, II, III) followed by one Work and Business lesson. Clear lesson boundaries with Roman numerals and subject changes. Note that Lesson III has a typo 'in.' instead of 'III.' in the original text.
